tasks.title: System health check — verify orchestrator/dashboard/agents running
tasks.description: Verify all runtime components are operational: orchestrator/main.py, dashboard server, agents, watchdog, cron jobs
tasks.success_criteria: All 5 checks pass, results in reports/system_health.json

projects.name: Dashboard Quality & State Management
projects.description: Fix missing state fields and implement schema validation

tasks.title: Fix dashboard state — implement missing quality/model fields
tasks.description: Implement schema validation for dashboard/state.json. Add defaults for missing fields: quality, model, recent_tasks, changelog, research_feed
tasks.success_criteria: All required fields present on every write, no null/empty values

projects.name: Policy Enforcement & Budget Control
projects.description: Wire token/rescue budget limits and model routing

tasks.title: Policy enforcement — wire token/rescue budget limits
tasks.description: Implement token_enforcer.py, rescue_enforcer.py, update providers/router.py to enforce 10% token budget and model routing rules
tasks.success_criteria: Budget enforced, all decisions logged to reports/policy_enforcement.jsonl

projects.name: Multi-Loop Execution & Self-Improvement
projects.description: Implement DAG + parallel + memory + self-improve for multi-pass execution

tasks.title: Optimize multi-loop execution — DAG + parallel + memory + self-improve
tasks.description: Wire DAG dependency tracking, parallel task execution, semantic memory, and self-improvement loop into orchestrator/continuous_loop.py
tasks.success_criteria: Multi-pass loops (2-3 passes/session), parallel execution active, self-improvement running every 50 tasks

projects.name: Local Agent Autonomy Setup
projects.description: Set up routing and task dispatch for fully autonomous execution

tasks.title: Set up local agent handoff — document all work for agents/__init__.py router
tasks.description: Verify agents/__init__.py router picks up tasks from projects.json, update projects.json with all 5 tasks, prepare for autonomous execution
tasks.success_criteria: All 5 tasks listed in projects.json, agents/__init__.py routes tasks correctly, orchestrator --auto 5 executes all

projects.name: P0 Blockers — Unblock Task Execution (URGENT)
projects.description: Fix 6 critical blockers preventing local agents from executing tasks. Must complete within 12 hours.

tasks.title: P0: Fix task state persistence — results must update projects.json
tasks.description: After each agent completes a task, orchestrator must persist: status='completed', quality_score, elapsed_time, result summary. Currently agent results are lost and tasks never transition from in_progress. Test: run_version() with any pending task, verify projects.json status updates and quality is non-zero.
tasks.success_criteria: At least 1 task transitions from pending→completed in projects.json; quality_score is non-zero

tasks.title: P0: Fix task router stuck-task logic — retry in_progress > 5 min
tasks.description: Currently projects_loader.py skips all in_progress tasks forever, so they get stuck. Must add: if task status='in_progress' AND elapsed > 300s, reset to 'pending' and re-execute. Add timeout field to track when task entered in_progress state. Test: create stuck task, verify it retries after 5 min timeout.
tasks.success_criteria: Stuck task (in_progress > 5min) resets to pending and re-executes; add test case to verify

tasks.title: P0: Wire quality score pipeline — executor → projects.json → dashboard
tasks.description: Quality metric completely broken: executor returns quality=85 but dashboard shows 0. Trace: agents/executor.py → orchestrator/main.py → orchestrator/projects_loader.py → dashboard/state.json. Add logging at each step. Ensure quality_score is normalized and persisted. Test: executor returns quality=85, verify it appears in projects.json AND dashboard/state.json.
tasks.success_criteria: Dashboard state.json shows quality > 0 for completed tasks; quality flows end-to-end

tasks.title: P0: Dashboard state writer — enforce schema validation
tasks.description: state.json has null/empty fields: quality, model, recent_tasks, changelog, research_feed. Writer must validate: (1) no null values allowed, (2) missing fields get defaults, (3) types validated. Test: attempt to write invalid state, verify schema correction.
tasks.success_criteria: state.json never has null/empty required fields; all writes pass schema validation

tasks.title: P0: Wire token enforcer module into orchestrator
tasks.description: Module exists (orchestrator/token_enforcer.py) but not connected to execution flow. Must wire: (1) Check is_rescue_allowed() before any rescue decision, (2) Deduct tokens on rescue, (3) Block rescue if limit exceeded (10% budget), (4) Log all decisions to reports/token_decisions.jsonl. Test: hit token limit, verify rescue is blocked.
tasks.success_criteria: Rescue decisions logged and budget-enforced; token limit blocks rescue when 10% exceeded

tasks.title: P0: System health check baseline — all 5 checks pass
tasks.description: Establish baseline: Verify orchestrator running, dashboard server alive, agents responsive, watchdog active, cron jobs executing. Create reports/system_health.json with results. Test: run each check independently, document expected values, add to CI/CD health monitoring.
tasks.success_criteria: 5/5 health checks pass; results logged to reports/system_health.json with timestamps

tasks.title: P0: Task dispatch broken
tasks.description: All 5 tasks pending, none executing. Orchestrator not picking up tasks from projects.json.

tasks.title: P0: Tasks not executing
tasks.description: No tasks executing (all pending). Orchestrator may not be dispatching tasks from projects.json.

metadata.mission: Beat Opus 4.6 with 90% local / 10% Claude rescue
